name: Santa Maria Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 pound small pink beans (pinkitas or pintos)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover beans with water and soak overnight.
2. Drain the beans and cover them with fresh cold water.
3. Simmer for 2 hours or until tender.
4. Meanwhile, saute the bacon and ham until lightly browned.
5. Add garlic and saute for 1 to 2 minutes.
6. Add tomato puree, chile sauce, sugar, mustard, and salt.
7. Drain most of the liquid from the beans.
8. Stir in the sauce.
9. Keep warm over very low heat or in a low oven until ready to serve.
Makes 6 to 8 servings.
